St Katharine Rural Connect

Strengthening rural communities through support, connection, and care

We serve farmers, offshore workers, families, and community members by creating accessible pathways to wellness, practical resources, and meaningful belonging.

Get in TouchSee What's On

Need to talk now? Call 01234 567890

I Am A...

Find Support For You

Farmer

Find support tailored to life on the farm.

Learn more

Offshore Worker

Stay connected to support, wherever you're working.

Learn more

Family Member

Support for those holding things together at home.

Learn more

Community Member

Get involved, connect, and be part of something good.

Learn more

Our Services

Four Pillars of Support

Whether you need someone to talk to, practical help on the farm, or a place to feel part of something -- we're here for you.

Supporting Your Wellbeing

Whether you're dealing with stress, loneliness, or just a difficult season, we're here to listen and help you find the right support.

Learn more

Supporting Farm Life

Farming is more than a job -- it's a way of life. We offer practical support, peer connection, and help navigating the pressures of life on the land.

Learn more

Supporting Those Who Work Away

For offshore, rotational, and remote workers -- and the families who hold things together back home. We're here wherever you are.

Learn more

Strengthening Our Community

Community doesn't just happen -- it takes people showing up. Join us for events, workshops, volunteering, and everything in between.

Learn more

Our Impact

Community Partners

Service Areas

“

Running a farm can be overwhelming, especially when everything feels like it depends on you. St Katharine Rural Connect gave us more than information -- they gave us support we could actually use, and people who understood the pressures we were under. It made us feel less alone.

— James, dairy farmer near Huntly

Get Involved

Be Part of Something Meaningful

There are many ways to support rural communities — and every contribution makes a difference.

Volunteer With Us

Give your time and skills to help strengthen your community. From events to mentoring, there's a role for everyone.

Find Out How

Become a Partner

Join a network of organisations committed to rural wellbeing. Together, we can reach more people and make a bigger impact.

Partner With Us

Support Our Work

Your donation helps us keep services free and accessible for everyone who needs them. Every contribution counts.

Donate Today

Stay in the Loop

Get updates on events, workshops, and community news delivered to your inbox. No spam, just the good stuff.
